category_sources: source_facts.description says it creates and verifies OpenTimestamps proofs; official GitHub README describes timestamp proofs using the Bitcoin blockchain.
display_name_sources: Official repository title and README use "OpenTimestamps Client"; source_facts.name is opentimestamps-client.
docs_sources: Official opentimestamps/opentimestamps-client README is the primary usage documentation; repo doc/git-integration.md is official client documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GitHub result is opentimestamps/opentimestamps-client for OpenTimestamps Client.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists a command-line wrapper; official README describes timestamp proofs, Bitcoin attestation, and PGP signed Git commit timestamping.
